subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face to the Countenance whereby earth and heaven were illumined! Blessed art thou for having remained firm in the Covenant. Glad tidings be unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی وجه اشرقت به الارض و السموات طوبی لک بما ثبت علی المیثاق بشری
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
